name: CareCredit Card

other_benefits.name: Promotional financing
other_benefits.description: 0% intro financing for 6, 12, 18, or 24 months on purchases $200+ at 285,000+ CareCredit enrolled providers and select retail locations

other_benefits.name: Wide provider network
other_benefits.description: Use at doctors, dentists, veterinarians, optometrists, dermatologists, hearing care, and more

notes: Healthcare/medical financing card. NOT a rewards card — no cash back or points. High regular APR (~26.99%). Use only for promotional financing; carrying a balance is costly. Can be upgraded to CareCredit Rewards Mastercard (separate card).
